headline: Scientists Discover That Penguins Are Secretly Running a Global Underground Fish Syndicate
summary: Antarctic authorities are 'flipping out' over the feathered mafia.
fullBody: A groundbreaking study released by the University of Antarctica reveals that emperor penguins have formed an elaborate crime network trading premium sushi across continents using icebreaker submarines. 'They waddle with purpose,' said lead researcher Dr. Icy McFreeze. The penguins allegedly use their tuxedo-like appearance to blend into high-society events. Interpol has issued warrants for 12,000 suspects. One whistleblower puffin claims the operation is funded by stolen krill futures.
